message:
fix: correct CI toolchain to nightly, fix badge styles, remove redundant tests

Fixes found during fresh-eyes review of the previous commit:

1. CI toolchain mismatch: all workflows specified `dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable`
   but the project pins nightly via `rust-toolchain.toml`. The dtolnay action
   would install stable, then rust-toolchain.toml would override it to nightly
   on subsequent cargo commands — confusing and potentially broken if nightly
   isn't pre-installed. Changed all jobs to `@nightly` to match the project's
   actual toolchain requirement.

2. Badge style inconsistency: CI status badges used default flat style while
   version/language/license used `for-the-badge`. Switched CI badges to
   shields.io workflow status badges with `style=for-the-badge` for visual
   consistency.

3. README claimed "Rust 1.75+" which contradicts the nightly pin. Changed to
   "Rust nightly (pinned via rust-toolchain.toml)".

4. Security audit job was missing Swatinem/rust-cache, causing cargo-audit to
   recompile from scratch every run (~2-3 min waste). Added cache.

5. Removed redundant `cargo test --doc` step — already covered by
   `cargo test --all-features`.

6. E2E workflow had env vars split between inline and `env:` block. Moved
   all three (E2E_VERBOSE, E2E_TIMEOUT, E2E_SKIP_PREFLIGHT) to the `env:`
   block for consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -28,7 +28,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
           components: rustfmt, clippy
 
@@ -52,7 +52,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
 
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
         with:
@@ -61,9 +61,6 @@ jobs:
       - name: Run tests
         run: cargo test --all-features --verbose
 
-      - name: Run doc tests
-        run: cargo test --doc
-
   security:
     name: Security Audit
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
@@ -72,7 +69,9 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
 
       - name: Install cargo-audit
         run: cargo install cargo-audit --locked
@@ -101,7 +100,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
           targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
 
@@ -128,7 +127,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
 
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2

@@ -41,7 +41,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
 
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
 
@@ -66,7 +66,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
 
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
 
@@ -79,9 +79,11 @@ jobs:
       - name: Run E2E test suite
         run: |
           chmod +x scripts/e2e/run_all_tests.sh
-          E2E_VERBOSE=1 E2E_TIMEOUT=600 ./scripts/e2e/run_all_tests.sh
+          ./scripts/e2e/run_all_tests.sh
         env:
-          E2E_SKIP_PREFLIGHT: 0
+          E2E_VERBOSE: "1"
+          E2E_TIMEOUT: "600"
+          E2E_SKIP_PREFLIGHT: "0"
 
       - name: Upload test logs
         if: always()

@@ -2,8 +2,8 @@
 
 <div align="center">
 
-[![CI](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/automated_flywheel_setup_checker/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/automated_flywheel_setup_checker/actions/workflows/ci.yml)
-[![E2E Tests](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/automated_flywheel_setup_checker/actions/workflows/e2e-tests.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/automated_flywheel_setup_checker/actions/workflows/e2e-tests.yml)
+[![CI](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/Dicklesworthstone/automated_flywheel_setup_checker/ci.yml?style=for-the-badge&label=CI)](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/automated_flywheel_setup_checker/actions/workflows/ci.yml)
+[![E2E Tests](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/Dicklesworthstone/automated_flywheel_setup_checker/e2e-tests.yml?style=for-the-badge&label=E2E)](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/automated_flywheel_setup_checker/actions/workflows/e2e-tests.yml)
 ![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-0.1.0-bd93f9?style=for-the-badge)
 ![Language](https://img.shields.io/badge/Language-Rust-f74c00?style=for-the-badge)
 ![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow?style=for-the-badge)
@@ -107,7 +107,7 @@ cargo install --git https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/automated_flywheel_setu
 
 ### Requirements
 
-- **Rust** 1.75+ (nightly pinned via `rust-toolchain.toml`)
+- **Rust nightly** (pinned via `rust-toolchain.toml`; automatically installed by `rustup`)
 - **Docker** (for running isolated installer tests)
 - **ACFS repository** cloned locally (default: `/data/projects/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup`)
